title: Real Paladium vV11
description: This mod added new minerals: Paladium, Amethyst, Titane and more... (Original Mod Paladium/Palamod of Fuzay's server)
body:
**Dive into the unique world of Paladium**, right in your own game! This mod meticulously recreates the mechanics and items that made the server a legend.

**Iconic Tools and Items**: Rediscover the power of the 3x3 Hammer for massive mining, and the efficiency of the God's Pickaxe.

**Production and Combat**: Automate resource creation with the Crusher and the Grinder. Face your friends in battle with the famous PVP Sticks.

**New Ores**: Explore your world to find and use new minerals: Paladium, Amethyst, Green Paladium, Endium, Trixium, findium, and Titan, each with its own unique properties.

This mod is perfect for players who feel nostalgic about the server or anyone looking to discover a unique and exciting gameplay experience.

**Real Paladium V10.5 Mod Solo Presentation**
